hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^(npm|yarn) '; then echo 'Use pnpm. npm and yarn are not allowed in this repo.' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *"schema.prisma"* ]]; then pnpm prisma:generate; fi
FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]]; then pnpm eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>&1 || true; fi
